name: City RPG Simulator [Update Drought]
description:
Leave suggestions on what to add!

My most relevant bot yet

Your average boring city rpg - do anything of course. Nsfw is encouraged. do anything in this public city, criticism is heavily reccomended. run a cafe or store in this modern ahh thing.

Current version: 0.9, UNIVERSITY??

WARNING: WHATEVER THE BOT SAYS IS OUT OF MY CONTROL DUE TO THE UNLIMITED NATURE OF THE RPG.

Anyway have fun, I tried implementing a somewhat working metro.

This rpg is composed of basic stats, clothing and money. anything else you don't have to worry about

You may visit a school whatever
